A

addActor(String) - Method in class Movie
Adds an actor to the movie's actor list.

D

decrement() - Static method in class Movie
Decrements the total number of Movie objects.

E

equals(Object) - Method in class Movie
Compares this movie to another object for equality.

getActors() - Method in class Movie
 
getGenre() - Method in class Movie
 
getMovieCount() - Static method in class Movie
 
getNumRented() - Method in class Movie
 
getTitle() - Method in class Movie

I

isBlockbuster() - Method in class Movie
Determines whether this movie is a blockbuster.

M

Movie - Class in Unnamed Package
Movie is the class created to represent an online movie
Movie(String, int) - Constructor for class Movie
Constructs a Movie with a title and year released.
Movie(String, String) - Constructor for class Movie
Constructs a Movie with a title and genre.
Movie(String, String, int) - Constructor for class Movie
Constructs a Movie with a title, genre, and year released.
Movie(String, String, String) - Constructor for class Movie
Constructs a Movie with a title, genre, and one actor.

R

rent() - Method in class Movie
Increments the rental count for this movie by 1.

S

setGenre(String) - Method in class Movie
Sets the genre of the movie.
setYear(int) - Method in class Movie
Sets the year the movie was released.

T

toString() - Method in class Movie
Returns a string representation of the movie containing the title, year released, and genre.
